nasb.text: Therefore I will make the heavens tremble, And the earth will be shaken from its place At the fury of the Lord of hosts In the day of His burning anger.

esv.text: Therefore I will make the heavens tremble, and the earth will be shaken out of its place, at the wrath of the Lord of hosts in the day of his fierce anger.

cnv.text: 在萬軍之耶和華發怒的時候， 就是我大發烈怒的日子， 我要使天震動， 大地必搖撼，離開本位。

ccb.text: 我万军之耶和华发烈怒的日子， 必震动诸天， 摇撼大地。

csbs.text: 为此，在万军之耶和华烈怒的日子里， 因着我的盛怒，我要使诸天颤抖； 大地必从其原处震开。
